title: aerobion aphyllum
intro: Aerobion aphyllum, also known as sea rocket or sea rocket mustard, is a type of flowering plant found in coastal areas. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to reduce swelling and fight infections. The health benefits of Aerobion aphyllum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and even help to lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and seeds are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically to treat various skin conditions.
